title: Shiva The Super Hero 3

title: Vardiwaali Sherni
subTitle: Netravathi, a CCB officer, embarks on a mission to find her missing younger sister, Anjali, who has fallen victim to a sex scandal. However, as she delves deeper into the investigation, she uncovers a far more sinister conspiracy.

title: Ramayan

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

subTitle: Desperation sets in when Prakash's failing marriage is threatened by something otherworldly, prompting him to resort to black magic. He soon uncovers shocking family revelations.

subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Encounter Shankar
